metadata.name: Adjust Service for a Special Event

description: A major concert is scheduled. A service planner must add extra late-night train service to accommodate the crowds.

nodes.task_description: Review the event details, including expected attendance and end time.
Add three extra train departures on the Red Line after the normal end of service.

expected_outcome.expected: New, temporary trips are added to the schedule.

nodes.task_description: Assign crews to the extra trips from the extra board (a list of on-call operators).

expected_outcome.expected: Crews are assigned to operate the extra trains.

nodes.task_description: Publish the updated schedule and promote the extra service to the public.

expected_outcome.expected: The public is made aware of the additional late-night service.
